prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 PTSD criteria; structured assessment and trauma-focused care pathways common in many systems

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: moderate in high-risk services; variable in primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with access to trauma-focused psychotherapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Specialist trauma services and structured referrals exist in many countries
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Trauma-focused CBT/EMDR and SSRIs when indicated; integrated care for refugees in some settings
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Service demand and access variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong psychotherapy infrastructure and guideline-based care in many systems
